title: Sculk Themed GUI
description: Because we all love sculk's texture !
body:
## _Hello and welcome there :)_
### 
This GUI ResourcePack is definitely my _favorite_ so far. It's based on sculk's texture, and glows in the dark !

The screenshots in the gallery are in French, but the color of the container titles are also **available in English.**

**ClothConfig, Fabric and ModMenu are supported.**

You can give any feedback on the **discord server** I created for my GUIs. Feel free to join !

_Thank you, and have a nice day :)_
